title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Cookie Sheet, Baking Tray for Biscuits, Cookies & Gingerbread, Heavy-Duty Bakeware, Easy Clean, 35.5 x 26.5 x 0.8 cm, Grey
features: BAKING SHEET: This Chef aid baking sheet is perfect for use making Cookies,meringues biscuits and shortbread. Alternatively this tray can be used for a range of cooking applications too; such as chips, vegatables pizzas and many more. Thanks to its non-stick properties surface. No need for greaseproof paper

ROBUST: The thick carbon steel is incredibly strong, long-lasting and is an excellent heat conductor, incorporating a Goldflon non stick coating to allow cooked and baked goods to slide off with ease. Perfect size of 35.5 x 26.5 x 0.8 and inner size of 34.4 x 25.9 x 0.7 cm

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Cookie sheet can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer. The ability to go from freezer to oven is perfect for pre baking, and reheating from frozen when needed to keep baked goods fresher for longer

EASY STORAGE: This oven baking sheet is stackable for easy storage so you don't have to worry about it taking up a lot of space in your kitchen cupboards. Simply wash, dry and store safely until the next use

CHEF AID: The well known non-stick cookware range is a loved and popular range of products that caters for both domestic and commercial uses. This range of products is essential and built for everyday use
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
